programme.title: Panda and Macaw
programme.desc: Posse, the red panda, and Santiago, the saki, have been having issues with their teeth and the dentist brought his big pliers! Ever heard the tale of how the blue-throated macaw parrot was saved from extinction and started a new fashion trend in the process?

programme.title: Trip to Alaska
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo are making ice cream when Alim arrives with a smoked herring, ready to add it in. The kids protest-fish in ice cream? Alim challenges them and takes them to Alaska, where Jamie shows them that traditional ice cream there is made with seal fat and fish!

programme.title: Trip to Argentina
programme.desc: Milo, upset by his team's loss, decides to switch teams. Alim insists loyalty is for life and takes them to Argentina. They meet Sabrina, a San Lorenzo fan. After nearly causing a riot by using a wrong color, they learn that in Argentina, team loyalty is forever.

programme.title: Following the Fibre Optic Trail
programme.desc: How do data and information travel from one computer to another? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of fibre optics. Have hands-on fun by creating fibre optic strands, and get to know Charles Kuen Kao, the godfather of broadband transmission.

programme.title: Game Over
programme.desc: Flippy's having the worst day-until a short-circuit at the cafe turns his world into a video game! Now he has three lives per level and total control. It's the escape he wanted... or is it? Even in games, you have to face challenges. What happens if he runs out of lives?

programme.title: The Day Henry Met....a Surfboard
programme.desc: Henry meets a surfboard stuck upright in the sand at the beach. Henry becomes a surfer and helps Surfboard live his dream.

programme.title: Humpback Whale
programme.desc: Mommy and Daddy Owl struggle to understand the difference between whales - the animals and Wales - the country, leading to confusion, frustration, and a classic hit or two from Tom Jones.

programme.desc: How can we make a lot of cupcakes fast, and without getting in each other's way? To find out, Doki's team visits a toy factory in Germany where they see how an assembly line can help to make a lot of identical items in a short period.

programme.title: E1288
programme.desc: The best tunes in Korea! the most sensational music show on TV satisfies all your senses! Fantastic performances and Awe-inspiring harmony by the nation's top musicians! Follow the latest trend in the Korean music scene through the K-chart, a summary of the week's hottest songs.

programme.title: The Best Of Immortal Songs
programme.desc: The true classic of the century is born again! The legendary classic is reinterpreted by the best vocalists in Korea. Don't miss out on the heart-moving moments that transcend generations.

programme.title: E20
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: Love Is Elsewhere
programme.desc: Ching and Sung work in “Love Cafe” in the dazzling Soho and the main job is to cure broken hearts. But happiness won't last forever. After gathering with schoolmates, where Ching's ex-boyfriend Hung showed up, depute between Ching and Sung breaks out and their plan to study in Beijing almost vanishes... Joe met Kelly in a disco and falls into her in the first sight. However, Kelly is in fact a weapon of Joe's ex-girlfriend for revenge. But the more Kelly knows about Joe, the less she can pull herself out of the relationship... Yu has a handsome and career type boyfriend who will buy her everything. But what she needs is care which can't be bought. Sing, having a crush on Yu, always stands by her and comforts her desperate heart. But their 6-year age difference seems a gap that Yu couldn't step forward.

programme.title: The Moon
programme.desc: In 2029, South Korea's lunar exploration spacecraft Woori-ho embarks on a journey towards the Moon. The whole world pays attention to this great challenge, but a solar flare erupts, causing a solar wind to engulf the spacecraft, leaving only the crew member Hwang Sun-woo stranded alone. This is not the first time that South Korea's spacecraft has headed to the Moon. Five years ago, the Narae-ho soared into the sky with grand dreams, only to blow up into pieces upon launch. Now, in the face of another tragedy, the only survivor, Sun-woo, becomes the focus of the efforts of the Korea Aerospace Research Institute and the government. The entire nation hopes for his safe return. To ensure Sun-woo's rescue, the former flight director, Kim Jae-gook, who had been researching deep in the mountains, takes responsibility for the Narae-ho accident five years ago and rejoins the mission. However, his efforts alone are not enough. In search of another hope to rescue Sun-woo, Kim seeks the

programme.title: A Beautiful Moment
programme.desc: An ageing bachelor playboy finally meets the girl of his dreams and proposes marriage, only to discover her psychologist stepmom was his first love long ago. The future in-laws initially pretend not to know each other but as the wedding date gets nearer, the rekindling of long-dormant feelings develops into a cross-generational love triangle.

programme.title: Best Supporting Actors: Enter The Phoenix
programme.desc: Georgie's dad, Hung, was a Triad leader. After Hung's death, his right-hand Cheung intends to bring back Georgie to take over. But Cheung finds Sam, whom he mistakes for Georgie...

programme.title: E12 - Beat The Judges: Shamshir Showdown
programme.desc: In this final 'Beat the Judges' competition, two former Forged in Fire champions duel it out in a 5-hour round making a pichangatti to earn the right to go head-to-head with one of our formidable judges.

programme.title: E12 - The Search For Alexander The Great
programme.desc: The most celebrated warrior king in history stirs fascination more than 2,000 years after his death. The location of his body is the subject of much debate. Where is the mummy of Alexander the Great?

programme.title: E8 - National Treasures
programme.desc: From a bat swung by one of baseball's boldest pioneers to an iconic painting hidden behind a false wall, these finds prove that America's greatest treasures can turn up in the most unlikely places.

programme.title: Biz Talk
programme.desc: A groundbreaking 30-minute interview show, giving an in-depth look into how top companies around the world conduct business and how policymakers view the fast-changing world economy. It presents 360 degree profiles of industry movers and shakers, tech mavericks and policymakers, and drills down on the stories behind their success, to give you clarity on what's happening in every facet of business.

programme.title: Inheritors
programme.desc: Inheritors is a multi-media product from CGTN that shines a light on China's rich Intangible Cultural Heritage. Each 30-minute TV edition is hosted by a long-term expatriate in China who has a unique understanding of the country's culture. He or she will introduce viewers to people who are dedicating their lives to its protection, inheritance, innovation, development and promotion.

Priced Out Of Lisbon: When A Full-Time Job Isn't Enough
programme.desc: Lisbon is considered a dream city; but when it comes to its housing market, many people who live and work here are fighting to survive.

programme.title: Malta's Heritage On Wheels: The Fight To Save Its Buses
programme.desc: Malta's hand-painted buses, each one unique, once ferried locals and tourists alike. Now few remain, lovingly restored by specialist coachbuilders. We also ride with police on speed patrol and test the VinFast VF 6.

programme.title: Priced Out Of Lisbon: When A Full-Time Job Isn't Enough
programme.desc: Lisbon is considered a dream city; but when it comes to its housing market, many people who live and work here are fighting to survive.

programme.title: Legacies: Michael Jackson, Chernobyl
programme.desc: The 1980s may seem like the distant past. But some of the decade's historical and pop cultural events were so significant that their effects are still felt today. We go beyond nostalgia to reckon with their legacies.

programme.title: The Secret To Concentration - How To Increase Your Attention Span
programme.desc: Constant stimuli, digital distractions - how can we stay focused these days? Does talent, training, or technology help? Neuroscientists and mental coaches show how concentration works in the brain.

programme.title: Visa And Travel
programme.desc: From the waves of Robertsport to the roads of East Africa, this episode crosses borders. We ask why it's so hard to move within Africa, follow a truck driver on the Northern Corridor, and discover Seychelles' Creole culture.

programme.title: Malta's Heritage On Wheels: The Fight To Save Its Buses

programme.title: Homo Plasticus - The Plastic Inside Us
programme.desc: All organisms harbor an invisible, omnipresent enemy: plastic. Researchers worldwide have shown that plastic particles can also be detected in humans - in organs and bodily fluids.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: A duck dish and two sides were featured on the last first-class dinner menu served on the ''Titanic'' in April 1912. The participants must try to recreate it.

programme.title: E10 - Gregoire Wolinski/Sponge Cities/Chatelaison Gardens
programme.desc: Contents: Gregoire Wolinski, world aquascaping champion; the end of soil artificialisation thanks to sponge towns; Manoir de Chatelaison gardens; Don't panic with Caroline and Alexandre.

programme.title: E4 - Exploring Western Canada
programme.desc: In Revelstoke, Alexis and Thomas discover slackcountry skiing, a hybrid between resort and backcountry skiing. Though seemingly more accessible, slackcountry carries the same avalanche and rescue risks.

programme.title: E10 - Julie De Libran
programme.desc: One of the most Parisian and unusual designers discusses her spring-summer 2023 haute couture collection. The focus is firmly on the versatility of the garments, the work on the bias and sequins...

programme.title: E2 - The Thyssen-Bornemisza Museum, Madrid, Modern Painting
programme.desc: The collections at the Thyssen-Bornemisza Museum also include works by some of the greatest modern painters, such as: Monet, Morisot, Van Gogh, Gauguin, Derain, van Dongen, Cezanne, Braque, Kandinsky...

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: A duck dish and two sides were featured on the last first-class dinner menu served on the ''Titanic'' in April 1912. The participants must try to recreate it.

programme.title: E10 - Gregoire Wolinski/Sponge Cities/Chatelaison Gardens
programme.desc: Contents: Gregoire Wolinski, world aquascaping champion; the end of soil artificialisation thanks to sponge towns; Manoir de Chatelaison gardens; Don't panic with Caroline and Alexandre.

programme.title: E4 - Exploring Western Canada
programme.desc: In Revelstoke, Alexis and Thomas discover slackcountry skiing, a hybrid between resort and backcountry skiing. Though seemingly more accessible, slackcountry carries the same avalanche and rescue risks.

programme.title: E84
programme.desc: The magazine programme all about the art of living in Monaco, Provence and on the Cote d'Azur.

programme.title: E100
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E13 - The Paulin Brothers
programme.desc: The Paulin brothers grew up in Le Reposoir, a small village nestled in the heart of the Aravis, and each chose his own way to live the mountain to the extreme. programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: E6 - Hurricane Lester
programme.desc: A Houston area school teacher, who lost almost everything in Hurricane Harvey, sets out with Bear Grylls to face a different side of Mother Nature. Along the way, Lester is put to the test, but proves that no challenge is too tough for his unbreakable spirit.

programme.title: E6 - Pay Terry Back
programme.desc: Terry and Larry test 2 scenes from Mel Gibson’s film Payback. Mel's character is in the back of a taxi when 4 bad guys pull up next to him in an SUV, they open fire and Mel uses a bad guy in the cab as a shield. Test 2 will be after he escapes from cab Mel finds himself under the SUV and shoots up through the SUV at the bad guys.

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: Today on Million Dollar House Hunt we meet Diane and her son Alex. They’re searching for a multi million dollar apartment in Melbourne.

programme.title: E1 - The Big Deal
programme.desc: Claudia’s season starts off with a bang when she receives a $250,000 jade order, but things quickly turn sour when her crew questions if they have a big enough boulder to complete the sale.

programme.title: E2 - The Last Laugh
programme.desc: After years of getting the raw end of the deal with Scrappy Larry, Robin pulls a prank on his old buddy, but the fun and games end when Claudia’s buyer makes an unexpected request.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: The students learn about life and death on the farm as baby crocodiles hatch in their hands and they have to kill an adult. Repeated fumbling in roping practice leaves John livid with everyone and Lyn’s frustration with diminutive Renee reaches boiling point.

programme.title: E3 - Zac Efron
programme.desc: World-renowned survivalist Bear Grylls leads Zac Efron (Neighbors (2014)) on a non-stop extreme survival journey into the Northeast Appalachian mountain range wilderness. With Bear's help, Zac challenges himself physically, as well as mentally, on an awe-inspiring journey he could never have imagined.

programme.title: E1 - Learning to Do the Right Thing!
programme.desc: Join Buster as he learns to do the right thing! When Buster accidentally breaks the class flower, he panics & tries to cover it up, but soon learns that telling the truth is always the best thing to do. Then, when he & Daddy spot a steam train speeding out of control, they know they have to do the right thing! They race after the train & save the day! From cleaning up his toys to helping a puppy, Buster is always trying to do the right thing.

programme.title: E9 - JJ's Favorite Songs & Stories!
programme.desc: It's story time with JJ's favorite songs & stories! First, sing along to 'Wheels on the Bus' as JJ & his friends put on an interactive show. Then, settle in for some classic tales. Watch as the three little pigs try to build houses strong enough to keep the Big Bad Wolf away. Then, find out who wins a big race: the speedy hare or the slow & steady tortoise! Finally, learn a lesson about working hard with the story of the Grasshopper & the Ants.

programme.title: E6 - Digging into Earth Week
programme.desc: Get ready to dig into Earth Week with CoComelon! Cody helps Mom with backyard chores using his cool digger toy. Then, Ms. Appleberry helps the class start their own garden! Watch them plant seeds, water them & harvest delicious pumpkins, carrots & tomatoes. The nature fun continues as JJ counts apples at the farm, learns about composting & goes on a beautiful mountain nature walk with Bingo!

programme.title: E5 - Small Wonders of Earth Week
programme.desc: Blippi explores the small wonders of Earth Week! He shrinks down to meet a friendly ant colony on a mission to find food. Then, he learns why flies love garbage trucks & meets a singing worm in the mud! The tiny adventures continue as Blippi discovers how spiders make webs, helps a blue jay rebuild its nest & flies inside a beehive to see how honey is made!

programme.title: LPGA 2026 JM Eagle LA Championship presented by Plastpro -Day 3
E4 - Guitars
programme.desc: Dr Karl visits a guitar factory to see how Australia's favourite instrument is made. Precision machines and master craftspeople work in harmony to cut, shape, bend, sand, brace, glue, paint and coax a guitar into existence.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: The attack in the racist Southern States brings the whole issue of civil rights for blacks into the open and the Reverend Martin Luther King implores Robert Kennedy to take action. The nation is in danger of splitting apart.

programme.title: E10 - The Razor’s Edge
programme.desc: When Steve returns from a river rafting trip, Marcy refuses to let him back into the house until he shaves his newly-grown beard, and he’s forced to seek refuge with the Bundys.

programme.title: E20 - The Big Brother
programme.desc: John-Boy undertakes an act of charity that exposes the family to the unexpected wiles of a most unlikely con artist.

programme.title: E3 - Sad Cypress (Part 1)
programme.desc: Elinor Carlisle seems to be the obvious murderer of her ailing aunt and the beautiful romantic rival who broke up her engagement, but Poirot uncovers darker motives.

programme.desc: Because of Serena's spell, a college girl is forced to change her image and Darrin is almost forced to change his job.

programme.desc: Up-to-date news from the French regions presented by Cyril Viguier.

programme.title: Echappees Belles S19
programme.desc: Sophie Jovillard, Jerome Pitorin, Ismael Khelifa and Tiga embark the traveller that lies within each of us for a fabulous breath of fresh air! Ninety minutes filled with new horizons and fascinating encounters around the world, four different ways of seeing a city, a region, a country...

programme.title: Le Grand Jt Des Territoires:2026
programme.desc: Up-to-date news from the French regions presented by Cyril Viguier.

programme.title: E11 - From Parisian Charm To Charente Charm
programme.desc: Anne-Catherine Verwaerde compares the urban elegance of Paris and the gentle living of Charente to study their different inspirations in terms of decoration.

programme.title: E11 - From Parisian Charm To Charente Charm

programme.title: E7 - The Priestesses Of Bali

programme.title: Meurtres En Pays Catalan
programme.desc: Speleologists discover the body of a woman staged in a strange manner, surrounded by snakes. Two days later, a second victim is found in the same circumstances. An investigation in which Inspector Lionel Orphus must work alongside his first love, Eleonore Vallance.

programme.title: The Visualization Entertainment: Go! Kaneo-Kun
programme.desc: The show is MC-ed by comedian Ariyoshi Hiroiki, who hosts an NHK program on a regular basis for the first time. The mascot character 'Kaneo-kun' (voice of Nobu, of comedy duo Chidori), who loves money, visits various places, including popular visiting locations, and looks into different phenomena to learn how money plays a role. The undertaking help unravel unexpected trends in society. The program, which can be enjoyed by every member of the family, offers much food for thought.

programme.title: The Visualization Entertainment: Go! Kaneo-Kun
programme.desc: The show is MC-ed by comedian Ariyoshi Hiroiki, who hosts an NHK program on a regular basis for the first time. The mascot character 'Kaneo-kun' (voice of Nobu, of comedy duo Chidori), who loves money, visits various places, including popular visiting locations, and looks into different phenomena to learn how money plays a role. The undertaking help unravel unexpected trends in society. The program, which can be enjoyed by every member of the family, offers much food for thought.

programme.title: Ghostbusters: Frozen Empire
programme.desc: In Ghostbusters: Frozen Empire, the Spengler family returns to where it all started - the iconic New York City firehouse - to team up with the original Ghostbusters, who've developed a top-secret research lab to take busting ghosts to the next level. But when the discovery of an ancient artifact unleashes an army of ghosts that casts a death chill upon the city, Ghostbusters new and old must join forces to protect their home and save the world from a second Ice Age.

programme.title: E18
programme.desc: It's all hands on deck for the Reagan family, as they race to stop deadly mayhem in the city when the gangs of New York unite together to demand amnesty for the release of their imprisoned members and those awaiting trial.

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: In BOSTON BLUE, a universe expansion of the long-running top drama BLUE BLOODS, Wahlberg will reprise his role as NYPD officer Danny Reagan as he takes a position with Boston PD. Once in Boston, he is paired with detective Lena Peters, the eldest daughter of a prominent law enforcement family.

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: Season 2 of NCIS: Origins delves deeper into the unstoppable NCIS Camp Pendleton team led by the legendary Mike Franks, as well as Gibbs' early career as a special agent, and reveals the fate of Lala after last season's devastating car crash.

programme.desc: Highlights from the latest PGA TOUR tournament.

programme.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
programme.desc: Emmy Award- and Grammy Award-winning comedian Jimmy Fallon brings a high-tempo energy to the storied NBC franchise with his welcoming interview style, love of audience participation, spot-on impersonations and innovative sketches.

programme.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
programme.desc: Emmy Award- and Grammy Award-winning comedian Jimmy Fallon brings a high-tempo energy to the storied NBC franchise with his welcoming interview style, love of audience participation, spot-on impersonations and innovative sketches.

programme.title: E3 - Chasing Mako
programme.desc: In some of the most-remote regions on the planet, researchers dive deep and brave danger to unlock secret shark behaviours, challenge myths about sharks, and fight for the protection of these supreme predators – before it’s too late.

programme.title: E7 - Cambodia: Hidden Refuges
programme.desc: Bisected by the Mekong’s mighty waters, Cambodia is defined by its relationship to this great river. See why the country is a biodiversity hot spot and explore the secret refuges of animal populations that survive in its untouched natural habitats.

programme.title: E8 - Cambodia: Seasonal Cycles
programme.desc: The Mekong is Cambodia’s lifeline, especially during the scorching dry season, when precious moisture is hard to come by. Learn how all manner of flying creatures, from birds to bats, manage resources until the rainy season brings sweet relief.

programme.title: E5 - Deadly Rivals
programme.desc: Enter the world of a wild dog pack whose bountiful hunting grounds are threatened when a clan of spotted hyenas moves in nearby. The vulnerable pups start to go hungry as the scavenging rivals steal their food and eventually raid their den.

programme.title: E6 - Buffalo Showdown
programme.desc: To the lion, the buffalo is not only a satisfying dinner but also dangerous. Track a herd of 300 buffalo along with the Mwamba pride, who must act quickly and carefully if they are to take down their prey.

programme.title: Woodpeckers: The Hole Story
programme.desc: March to the steady drumbeat of a unique avian family. Learn why the world’s 239 woodpecker species, from massive to minute, are nature’s best lumberjacks; explore their flying, climbing, and calling skills; and get a look inside their secret nests.

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 日本最大的財閥集團「加賀美集團」的CEO，也是一位天才發明家，加賀美零隱藏自己的身份，潛入私立絵都學園，成為了一名高中教師。該校的3年0班是一個集合了被認為「無幹勁、無才能、無前途」的學生，被學校其他部分貶低為「零組」。加賀美零將在這樣的環境中，與這些學生共同成長，挑戰教育常規。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 日本最大的財閥集團「加賀美集團」的CEO，也是一位天才發明家，加賀美零隱藏自己的身份，潛入私立絵都學園，成為了一名高中教師。該校的3年0班是一個集合了被認為「無幹勁、無才能、無前途」的學生，被學校其他部分貶低為「零組」。加賀美零將在這樣的環境中，與這些學生共同成長，挑戰教育常規。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 文太（大泉洋）是一名被公司解雇的落魄上班族。在和妻子離婚後，因財產分割與賠償金而耗盡積蓄，只能過著寄宿在網咖的生活。就在某一天，文太奇蹟地通過了一家公司的最終面試。在文太前往公司提前準備好的住宅時，一位陌生女子突然出現在家中並對他說「歡迎回來」。這似乎是必須以「夫妻」的身分和這個「陌生的妻子」一起生活。文太瞬間成為有「一點點超能力」的英雄，被賦予的任務是——「拯救世界」。然而，還附帶了一條不合理又難以理解的規則：「不可以真心地去愛任何人」。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 只有最頂層的0.1%人口可住在天空城堡——一個獨特的住宅社區。在上流社會的「SKY Castle」中更住著一群欲扶助丈夫事業和培育子女成為二代貴族的貴婦。然而，這些貴婦都有一個秘密不能告訴任何人。她們的財富、榮譽和最重要的權力鬥爭從現在開始！

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 文太（大泉洋）是一名被公司解雇的落魄上班族。在和妻子離婚後，因財產分割與賠償金而耗盡積蓄，只能過著寄宿在網咖的生活。就在某一天，文太奇蹟地通過了一家公司的最終面試。在文太前往公司提前準備好的住宅時，一位陌生女子突然出現在家中並對他說「歡迎回來」。這似乎是必須以「夫妻」的身分和這個「陌生的妻子」一起生活。文太瞬間成為有「一點點超能力」的英雄，被賦予的任務是——「拯救世界」。然而，還附帶了一條不合理又難以理解的規則：「不可以真心地去愛任何人」。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 文太（大泉洋）是一名被公司解雇的落魄上班族。在和妻子離婚後，因財產分割與賠償金而耗盡積蓄，只能過著寄宿在網咖的生活。就在某一天，文太奇蹟地通過了一家公司的最終面試。在文太前往公司提前準備好的住宅時，一位陌生女子突然出現在家中並對他說「歡迎回來」。這似乎是必須以「夫妻」的身分和這個「陌生的妻子」一起生活。文太瞬間成為有「一點點超能力」的英雄，被賦予的任務是——「拯救世界」。然而，還附帶了一條不合理又難以理解的規則：「不可以真心地去愛任何人」。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 講述失去笑容的朝鮮王世子，擁有冷峻氣質與壓倒性的氣場，背負着喪失摯愛與朝廷鬥爭的傷痛。以及樂觀開朗的女攤販，雖然失去部分過去記憶，仍堅強面對生活。在某日二人意外靈魂互換，進而展開對自身與他人命運的重新審視，並因靈魂互換而展開浪漫奇幻愛情故事。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 講述一位懷抱著成為名作家夢想的志願生，雖然父親期望他成為像「尹東柱」這樣的劃時代詩人而取名，但現實是只有一身債務的作家志願生陸東柱，和來歷不明、有著特殊能力的少年姜山超越時間的界限一起尋找真相並創造奇蹟的過程。

programme.title: Happy Ghost IV
programme.desc: Hong Sum Kwai is enjoying a second life in metropolis Hong Kong. His girlfriend, Annie, is oblivious to the fact that her former incarnation was the village girl who perished the General to eternal suffering. Hong Sum Kwai teaches at the school where Annie's father serves as the principal. There are four sprightly yet mischievous male students in Hong Sum Kwai's charge, but they are duped by the girls and left stranded in the wilderness discovering the dead body of the General...

programme.title: The Inspector Wears Skirts II
programme.desc: Hong Kong's police force boasts of two of the world's finest anti-crime task forces-the Flying Tigers and the Banshees. After Madam Hu and her Banshees have put ringleaders of a notorious jewelry gang behind the bars, they return to routine training. New recruits to the Banshees – Joey, Phoebe, Ding and Susanna – soon blend themselves into the daily pursuit for tougher and fun. Lo, the anti-terrorist expert, is to inspect the Tigers and Banshees. A strengthened diet of training is introduced amid the moans and groans. Before long, the jewelry robbers escape to a deserted island. The Tigers and Banshees are ordered to capture them...
